description_long: This modern house features a multi-level design with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of black and neutral exterior finishes. The property includes a spacious front driveway with two cars parked, a landscaped garden with trees and shrubs, and a backyard area with a swimming pool and outdoor seating. The house has a rooftop terrace with glass railings, providing additional outdoor living space. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and contemporary architectural profile. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and smaller, more private openings. The overall layout suggests a luxurious, urban residence with ample outdoor amenities and modern styling.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, a rooftop terrace, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two parked cars, main entrance, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garden, greenery, and the connection between different house volumes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, terrace, and the overall massing of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door flanked by landscaping and driveway.
